notes: Build assertion (eval 1) failed for both configurations due to shell permission restrictions — not a skill quality issue
Biggest skill impact on Bootstrap (83% vs 17%): without skill, agent invented its own folder structure, wrong colors, no lazy loading
Without skill, Timer missed localStorage persistence entirely — state lost on refresh
Without skill, Mood used generic Tailwind classes instead of Colibri design tokens
Skill adds ~100s average execution time and ~14k tokens but improves pass rate by 39 percentage points
BottomNav 5-item assertion passes in both configs — this is explicitly stated in the prompt, not skill-dependent
